input_text: We would like to purchase 50 standard business laptops for a new operations team. We signed a master agreement in May 2026. Please provide your best quotation with the applicable discount.
Our retail headquarters needs 120 ergonomic office chairs and 60 office desks for the new floor expansion. Please quote based on our existing office supply agreement.
We need a commercial HVAC maintenance package for our outpatient facility. Please include compliance terms and service-level commitments.
Please provide an annual quotation for 300 CRM Enterprise seats and 300 endpoint security seats for our school administration teams.
We need 12 electric pallet trucks and 40 warehouse storage rack sets for the new distribution center. Please apply the logistics framework agreement terms.
